---
id: accept-1-nce-os-agreements
title: "Accept 1NCE OS Agreements"
description: "Post request to accept the 1NCE OS Terms of Use and Data Processing agreements. Please note that with this request the agreements can only be accepted."
sidebar_label: "Accept 1NCE OS Agreements"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

info_path: api/1nce-os/1-nce-os
custom_edit_url: null
---

  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/agreements/1nceos"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

Post request to accept the 1NCE OS Terms of Use and Data Processing agreements. Please note that with this request the agreements can only be accepted.
